about: Hot-redundancy role and addressing for this OpenPLC pair. Peer IPv4s must match the IPv4 on the interface named redundancy_heartbeat_nic_linux_ifname. functional_io_nic_*_linux_ifname: interfaces used for permanent_master_functional_* CIDR fields and for standby backup addresses. Omitted or invalid NIC names fall back to ens35 / ens33 / ens34.
